name: puremaccli
description: First-party PureMac command-line interface for host disk hygiene automation by OpenClaw and Hermes.

commands.name: status
commands.summary: Report current disk free-space status against a minimum percentage threshold.

commands.name: scan
commands.summary: Find safe developer build artifact cleanup candidates under configured roots.

commands.name: clean
commands.summary: Clean safe candidates when disk free space is below threshold; dry-run unless --execute is provided.

commands.name: install-agent
commands.summary: Write a LaunchAgent plist for periodic threshold-driven cleanup.

commands.name: uninstall-agent
commands.summary: Remove the PureMac cleanup LaunchAgent plist if present.
